name: bookingfish-calendar-mcp
description: Model Context Protocol server for BookingFish Calendar WordPress plugin. Enables AI assistants to interact with booking data, calendar availability, and page management.

tools.name: check_availability
tools.description: Check real-time availability for a fishing guide's boat on specific dates

tools.name: create_booking_page
tools.description: Create a WordPress page with embedded booking calendar for a specific boat

tools.name: get_gift_certificate_templates
tools.description: List available gift certificate templates for the connected vendor

tools.name: sync_calendar_data
tools.description: Trigger manual sync of calendar data from BookingFish.ca

resources.name: Boat Availability
resources.description: Get real-time availability calendar for a specific boat

resources.name: Created Pages
resources.description: List WordPress pages created by the plugin

prompts.name: setup_new_vendor
prompts.description: Step-by-step guidance for connecting a new BookingFish vendor account

prompts.name: troubleshoot_embed
prompts.description: Help debug issues with calendar or gift certificate embed display
